'''tashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nuptially|nuptially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nuptially|nuptially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tashate|tashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tashatesher|tashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashatesherĂ«m|tashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tashatero|tashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tashateshĂ«|tashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashateshĂ«m|tashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitashatero|gokitashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitashateshĂ«|gokitashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashateshĂ«m|gokitashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotashankerom|gotashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotashankeshĂ«|gotashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotashankeshĂ«m|gotashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotashankeya|gotashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tashaterom|tashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashatemu|tashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tashateya|tashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitashaterom|gokitashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashatemu|gokitashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitashateya|gokitashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tashashate|tashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tashashatesher|tashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashashatesherĂ«m|tashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tashashatero|tashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tashashateshĂ«|tashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashashateshĂ«m|tashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitashashatero|gokitashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitashashateshĂ«|gokitashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashashateshĂ«m|gokitashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotashashankerom|gotashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotashashankeshĂ«|gotashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotashashankeshĂ«m|gotashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotashashankeya|gotashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tashashaterom|tashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tashashatemu|tashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tashashateya|tashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitashashaterom|gokitashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitashashatemu|gokitashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitashashateya|gokitashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠte|tĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠtesher|tĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠtero|tĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠshĂŠtero|gokitĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠterom|tĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠtemu|tĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠshĂŠteya|tĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠshĂŠterom|gokitĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠshĂŠteya|gokitĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafshafte|tafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafshaftesher|tafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafshaftesherĂ«m|tafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafshaftero|tafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafshafteshĂ«|tafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafshafteshĂ«m|tafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafshaftero|gokitafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafshafteshĂ«|gokitafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafshafteshĂ«m|gokitafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafshafnkerom|gotafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafshafnkeshĂ«|gotafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafshafnkeshĂ«m|gotafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafshafnkeya|gotafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafshafterom|tafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafshaftemu|tafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafshafteya|tafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafshafterom|gokitafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafshaftemu|gokitafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafshafteya|gokitafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
